summary: Sprint 0+1 backend testing for EDITIONS FABS-CI ERP. 25/25 pytest tests passed covering health, auth (cookie+Bearer), seed idempotency, RBAC, expired sessions, inactive accounts, logout, CORS, and MongoDB _id projection. Seed verified idempotent after backend restart.

minor.issue: Sending body without 'session_id' key returns 422 (Pydantic) rather than the documented 400. Empty-string session_id correctly returns 400. Minor — both are 4xx; consider customizing the validation handler if a 400 is contractually required.

action_items: (Optional) Convert FastAPI's default 422 to 400 for missing 'session_id' on /api/auth/session to fully match the documented contract.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~345 lines — clean, single-file is acceptable for Sprint 0/1 but split into routers/auth, routers/profiles, models/, db/ before features pile up.
All MongoDB reads use `{"_id": 0}` projection — verified no _id leakage on any auth/profiles response.
CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' + allow_credentials=True. The K8s ingress already rewrites ACAO to '*' which is fine for the current Bearer-token path; comment in code already explains this.

user_sessions index is unique on session_token + TTL index on expires_at — good. Consider adding `expireAfterSeconds: 0` on the expires_at index so MongoDB auto-purges expired sessions instead of relying on the 401-on-read check.

auth_session() stores Emergent's session_token verbatim; if Emergent ever returns the same token to two users (very unlikely) the unique index would 500 the request. Wrap the insert in try/except DuplicateKeyError -> upsert.
datetime fields stored as ISO strings — works but loses native date queries. Consider storing as BSON Date for indexing/TTL.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/session — abuse could brute-force Emergent. Add slowapi or rely on ingress.
test_credentials: Documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Tokens test_super_admin_valid_token (super_admin) and test_dg_valid_token (directeur_general) persist in MongoDB for 7 days.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 3 sessions in user_sessions: test_super_admin_valid_token, test_dg_valid_token, test_expired_token. Pre-seeded users auto-created by backend startup hook (2 documents).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Sprint 0+1 fully green. Re-use tokens from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. If tokens are missing, recreate via the mongosh snippet in that file. Real Emergent Google session_id cannot be tested programmatically — only the rejection paths (missing/empty/invalid) are covered. /api/auth/session happy path requires manual UI testing through Emergent OAuth redirect. The 422 vs 400 discrepancy on missing session_id is the only minor finding — test accepts both.
